name: Egg Beaters Nog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, combine 5 cups skim milk and egg beaters.
2. Gradually whisk in sugar until thickened, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla extract and rum extract. Cover and chill.
4. Just before serving, add brandy if desired and thin to desired consistency with remaining skim milk.
5. Sprinkle with nutmeg and cinnamon.
Per Serving: 152 calories (25% protein, 56% carbohydrate, 7% fat, 11% alcohol), 10g protein, 21g carbohydrate, 1g fat, 3mg cholesterol, 145mg sodium.
Exchanges: 1/2 milk, 1/2 meat.
Makes 8 servings.
